component.name: Search bar
component.description: Jobs search field: 48px-tall row, typography Input, leading search glyph (20px), optional clear when value present. Default border `Foundation/Border/Subtle`; focused ring `2px` `Brand/PrimaryStroke`. Optional **Empty State Results** card (≈345×159) with large search icon, `Typography/Body-Bold` title, `Typography/Input-Small` hint.

variants.Focus: Typed value `Foundation/Text/Primary`; 2px `Brand/PrimaryStroke`; trailing clear control on muted circle.
variants.Empty State Results: White card, 16px radius, subtle border, centered hint copy — show when search UI is active and query empty (product logic).
